mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.building_id, d.dormitory_no, b.building_name, b.building_no, bd.dormitory_type, d.floor_number, d.room_usage_type, d.bed_capacity, d.room_type, CASE d.room_type WHEN 1 THEN '四人间' WHEN 2 THEN '六人间' WHEN 3 THEN '八人间' ELSE '未知' END as room_type_name, d.gender_type, CASE d.gender_type WHEN 1 THEN '男生宿舍' WHEN 2 THEN '女生宿舍' WHEN 3 THEN '混合宿舍' ELSE '未知' END as gender_type_name, d.bed_count as max_capacity, d.occupied_beds as current_count, d.occupied_beds, d.status, CASE d.status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '维修' WHEN 3 THEN '停用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT cdb.class_id ORDER BY cdb.class_id) FROM class_dormitory_bindings cdb WHERE cdb.dormitory_id = d.id) as assigned_class_ids, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT c.class_name ORDER BY c.class_name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM class_dormitory_bindings cdb LEFT JOIN classes c ON cdb.class_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE cdb.dormitory_id = d.id) as assigned_class_names, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM dormitories d LEFT JOIN buildings b ON d.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN building_dormitories bd ON d.building_id = bd.building_id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, building_id, dormitory_no, floor_number, room_type, bed_count, occupied_beds, gender_type, supervisor_id, facilities, notes, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM dormitories WHERE dormitory_no = #{dormitoryNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id, d.building_id, d.org_unit_id, d.dormitory_no, b.building_name, b.building_no, o.unit_name as org_unit_name, d.floor_number, d.room_type, d.bed_capacity, d.occupied_beds, CASE d.room_type WHEN 1 THEN '四人间' WHEN 2 THEN '六人间' WHEN 3 THEN '八人间' ELSE '未知' END as room_type_name, d.gender_type, CASE d.gender_type WHEN 1 THEN '男生宿舍' WHEN 2 THEN '女生宿舍' WHEN 3 THEN '混合宿舍' ELSE '未知' END as gender_type_name, d.bed_count as max_capacity, d.occupied_beds as current_count, d.status, CASE d.status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 0 THEN '停用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM dormitories d LEFT JOIN buildings b ON d.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN org_units o ON d.org_unit_id = o.id AND o.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.building_id = #{buildingId} ORDER BY d.floor_number ASC, d.dormitory_no ASC

SELECT d.id, d.building_id, d.dormitory_no, b.building_name, b.building_no, d.floor_number, d.room_type, CASE d.room_type WHEN 1 THEN '四人间' WHEN 2 THEN '六人间' WHEN 3 THEN '八人间' ELSE '未知' END as room_type_name, d.gender_type, CASE d.gender_type WHEN 1 THEN '男生宿舍' WHEN 2 THEN '女生宿舍' WHEN 3 THEN '混合宿舍' ELSE '未知' END as gender_type_name, d.bed_count as max_capacity, d.occupied_beds as current_count, d.status, CASE d.status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 0 THEN '停用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM dormitories d LEFT JOIN buildings b ON d.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.gender_type = #{genderType} AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY b.building_name ASC, d.floor_number ASC, d.dormitory_no ASC

SELECT d.id, d.building_id, d.org_unit_id, d.dormitory_no, b.building_name, b.building_no, o.unit_name as org_unit_name, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT cdb.class_id ORDER BY cdb.class_id) as assigned_class_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT c.class_name ORDER BY c.class_name SEPARATOR ', ') as assigned_class_names, d.floor_number, d.room_type, d.bed_capacity, d.occupied_beds, CASE d.room_type WHEN 1 THEN '四人间' WHEN 2 THEN '六人间' WHEN 3 THEN '八人间' ELSE '未知' END as room_type_name, d.gender_type, CASE d.gender_type WHEN 1 THEN '男生宿舍' WHEN 2 THEN '女生宿舍' WHEN 3 THEN '混合宿舍' ELSE '未知' END as gender_type_name, d.bed_count as max_capacity, d.occupied_beds as current_count, d.status, CASE d.status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 0 THEN '停用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM dormitories d LEFT JOIN buildings b ON d.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN org_units o ON d.org_unit_id = o.id AND o.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN class_dormitory_bindings cdb ON d.id = cdb.dormitory_id LEFT JOIN classes c ON cdb.class_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId} AND d.status = 1 GROUP BY d.id, d.building_id, d.org_unit_id, d.dormitory_no, b.building_name, b.building_no, o.unit_name, d.floor_number, d.room_type, d.bed_capacity, d.occupied_beds, d.gender_type, d.bed_count, d.status, d.created_at, d.updated_at ORDER BY b.building_name ASC, d.floor_number ASC, d.dormitory_no ASC

SELECT d.id, d.building_id, d.dormitory_no, b.building_name, b.building_no, d.floor_number, d.room_type, CASE d.room_type WHEN 1 THEN '四人间' WHEN 2 THEN '六人间' WHEN 3 THEN '八人间' ELSE '未知' END as room_type_name, d.gender_type, CASE d.gender_type WHEN 1 THEN '男生宿舍' WHEN 2 THEN '女生宿舍' WHEN 3 THEN '混合宿舍' ELSE '未知' END as gender_type_name, d.bed_count as max_capacity, d.occupied_beds as current_count, d.status, CASE d.status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 0 THEN '停用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM dormitories d LEFT JOIN buildings b ON d.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY b.building_name ASC, d.floor_number ASC, d.dormitory_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE dormitories SET occupied_beds = #{occupiedBeds}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s INNER JOIN dormitories d ON s.dormitory_id = d.id WHERE d.building_id = #{buildingId} AND s.deleted = 0 AND d.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE dormitories SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND deleted = 0
